paragraph: Supply and fix [material] [element_type] partition/wall to [location]; including all [fixings], joints and sealants; finished to [standard].
External [material] cavity wall construction to [location]; including wall ties, insulation, DPC, movement joints and all associated metalwork; finished to [standard].
Supply and install [material] floor construction at [level]; including [substrate], insulation, screed, edge details and all associated fixings; finished to [standard].
Raised access floor system to [location]; [material] panels on adjustable pedestals at [height]mm clear void; including [edge_trim] edge trim, cutouts for services and all fixings.

Supply and fix [material] suspended ceiling system to [location] at [height]mm finished floor level; including primary and secondary grid, suspension wires, perimeter trim and all fixings; finished to [standard].
Plasterboard and skim ceiling to [location]; 2-layer [thickness]mm board on metal frame; including tape and joint, finishing coat and decoration to [standard].

Supply and install [material] roofing system to [location]; including [insulation] insulation, vapour control layer, upstands, flashings, outlets, gutters and all associated metalwork; finished to [standard].
Standing seam [material] metal roof cladding to [location]; including subframe, insulation, breather membrane, fixings, ridges, hips, valleys, abutments and rainwater outlets.

Fabricate, deliver and erect [material] structural column [section_size] to [location] at [level]; including base plates, column splices, holding-down bolts, fire protection to [standard] and applied [finish].
Fabricate, deliver and erect [material] structural [element_type] to [location]; including end plates, brackets, cleats, bolted connections, fire protection to [fire_rating] and applied [finish].

Supply and hang [material] [door_type] door [width]×[height]mm in [frame_material] frame to [location]; including [hardware] ironmongery, seals, threshold and decoration to [standard]; fire rating [fire_rating].
Automatic sliding door set [width]×[height]mm to [location]; including operator, full-height glazed panels, header rail, floor guide, safety sensors, signage and commissioning.
Supply and fix [material] [window_type] window unit [width]×[height]mm to [location]; including glazing to [glass_spec], ironmongery, sills, reveals, mastic pointing and decoration to [standard].
Curtain wall system to [location] spanning [grid_size]mm modules; [material] frame with [glass_spec] glazing; including cills, cappings, flashings, drainage, fixings and commissioning.

Supply and install [material] staircase from [level_from] to [level_to]; [tread_count] treads and risers; including structural strings/waist, landing, balustrading, handrail and all fixings; finished to [standard].

Supply and fix [material] balustrade/railing to [location]; [height]mm overall height; including posts at [spacing]mm centres, [infill_type] infill panels and [handrail_type] handrail; finished to [standard].
Supply, deliver and set in position [equipment_type] rated at [capacity]; including all anchor bolts, isolating pads, commissioning, O&M manuals and handover documentation; installed to [standard].

Supply and install [material] pipework [nominal_size]mm nominal bore to [service]; including fittings, joints, brackets, supports at [spacing]mm centres, insulation to [insulation_spec] and testing to [standard].

Supply and install [material] rectangular/circular ductwork [dimension] to [service] at [location]; including fittings, acoustic lining, fire dampers, brackets, insulation to [insulation_spec] and commissioning to [standard].
Supply, install and connect [equipment_type] rated at [rating] to [location]; including all associated [cabling] cabling, containment, earthing, labelling, testing and commissioning to [standard].

Supply, install and commission [fixture_type] luminaire [model_ref] to [location]; [wattage]W LED; including driver, emergency module where indicated, suspension/surface fixing and connection; lux level to [lux_target].

Supply and install [sprinkler_type] sprinkler head at [location]; including [pipe_size]mm supply pipe, fittings, supports and connection to sprinkler ring main; commissioned and tested to BS EN 12845.

Supply and fix [fixture_type] sanitary appliance [manufacturer_ref] to [location]; including all [connection_size]mm supply and waste connections, isolation valves, trap, sealant and commissioning; finished to [standard].
Supply and fix curtain wall panel unit [width]×[height]mm at [location]; [glass_spec] glazing in [frame_material] frame; including gaskets, thermal break, drainage, structural fixings and testing.
Supply and fix [material] curtain wall [mullion_type] mullion/transom [section_ref] at [location]; including thermal break, EPDM gaskets, snap-on cover and fixings; finished to [finish].
Supply and install [element_description] to [location]; including all [fixings], connections, sealing and making good; installed to manufacturer's recommendations and [standard].
Excavate and prepare [area_type] to [location]; including [depth]mm average depth, disposal of [material] arisings, compact and prepare formation; all to [standard].

Supply and construct [surface_type] car parking surface to [location]; including sub-base, base course, binder course, wearing course, road markings, kerbs, drainage and bay demarcation to [standard].

Construct [material] ramp from [level_from] to [level_to] at [gradient] gradient to [location]; including non-slip surface, edge protection, handrails, drainage channels and tactile paving; finished to [standard].

Supply, deliver, install and commission [equipment_type] [model_ref] to [location]; including all structural fixings, electrical/mechanical connections, testing, commissioning and staff training; installed to [standard].
Supply and deliver [furniture_type] [manufacturer_ref] to [location]; including assembly, installation, fixing to structure where required and removal of all packing materials; to [standard].
Supply and fix [material] [casework_type] to [location]; including carcass, doors, drawers, shelves, [worktop_material] worktop, ironmongery, fixings and [finish]; installed to [standard].

Excavate, form and cast [foundation_type] foundation to [location]; [concrete_spec] concrete, [reinforcement] reinforcement, [dimensions] dimensions; including blinding, formwork, waterproofing and backfill to [standard].
Supply and fix [terminal_type] air terminal [model_ref] [size]mm to [location]; including connecting ductwork, volume control damper, commissioning set and colour to [finish]; airflow [airflow]l/s.

Supply and install [material] cable tray/basket [width]×[depth]mm to [location]; including supports at [spacing]mm centres, covers where indicated, earthing bonding, bends and tees; installed to [standard].

Supply and install [conduit_type] conduit [diameter]mm nominal bore to [location]; including all fittings, draw-in boxes at [spacing]mm maximum centres, fixings and draw wire; installed to [standard].
